name: Elevra Lithium Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$11.3200. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$11.5557 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$11.3200, stop A$9.6426, target A$13.4250. Risk/reward is 1.25:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
